title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Yara International Chemical Group (UK) Co., Ltd
body: "Application number 5229  Applicant Yara UK Limited objected to the name used by Yara International Chemical Group (UK) Co., Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Yara International Chemical Group (UK) Co., Ltd is changed to 14805565, Ltd. "
